response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CommandRouter",
      "purpose": "Parse the input command and route to the appropriate handler",
      "behavior": "Reads the 'command' field from input JSON and dispatches to the corresponding child function based on command string",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle create_order command: validate user, check stock, calculate total, deduct stock, create order record",
      "behavior": "Checks user existence, verifies product stock, computes total price, updates product stock, and inserts new order record",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle pay_order command: validate order, check balance, deduct balance, update order status",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is pending, verifies user balance, deducts amount from user balance, updates order status to paid",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle ship_order command: validate order and update status to shipped",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is paid, updates order status to shipped",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle complete_order command: validate order and update status to completed",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is shipped, updates order status to completed",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle cancel_order command: validate order, restore stock, refund if paid, update status",
      "behavior": "Checks order exists and is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds user balance if paid, updates order status to cancelled",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle list_orders command: list orders with optional filters",
      "behavior": "Reads optional filters from order_data (user, status), queries orders store, returns matching orders",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle get_user_orders command: get all orders for a user with statistics",
      "behavior": "Queries orders for given user, calculates total spent and status distribution, returns orders and statistics",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProductsHandler",
      "purpose": "Handle list_products command: list products with stock, optionally filter low stock",
      "behavior": "Reads optional low_stock filter from order_data, queries products store, returns products with stock info",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ResponseFormatter",
      "purpose": "Format the output as a JSON object with success, message, and data fields",
      "behavior": "Takes the result from the handler (success boolean, message string, data object) and constructs the final output JSON",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order Management System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to nine specialized handlers (one per command) and a ResponseFormatter that standardizes output. This keeps each child focused on a single command, avoiding cross-calls between siblings, and maintains the same abstraction level. The parent invokes CommandRouter first, then the appropriate handler, then ResponseFormatter.",
  "dataflow_edges": [
    {
      "from_node": "parent",
      "from_output": "input",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "input",
      "note": "Pass raw input to router for command parsing"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to create order handler when command is create_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to pay order handler when command is pay_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to ship order handler when command is ship_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to complete order handler when command is complete_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to cancel order handler when command is cancel_order"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to list orders handler when command is list_orders"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to get user orders handler when command is get_user_orders"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command",
      "to_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Route to list products handler when command is list_products"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CreateOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "PayOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ShipOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CompleteOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CancelOrderHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "GetUserOrdersHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListProductsHandler",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "to_input": "result",
      "note": "Pass handler result to formatter for output"
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ResponseFormatter",
      "from_output": "output",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_input": "output",
      "note": "Return formatted output to parent"
    }
  ]
}
